name: Red, White, and Blue Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. First layer: Mix 2 packages Red Raspberry Jello with 2 cups hot water and 2 cups cold water. Chill and set.
2. Second layer: Heat 1 cup Half & Half and 1 cup sugar. Mix 1 package Knox Gelatin with 1 cup cold water and 1 Tbsp vanilla. Pour the two mixtures into a blender with one (8 oz) package Cream Cheese. Blend until smooth. Cool, then pour over the first layer.
3. Third layer: Combine 1 package Black Raspberry Jello with 1 cup hot water and 1 can frozen Blueberries.
